posts.author: JVZ (João Vitor Guimarães Zalotti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good afternoon,

I work for a company that recently started using Monday.com to organize our tasks and schedules. Our development team was recently wondering if it’s possible to use a numeric column to input work hours (e.g., 4 hours) and automatically update the Timeline to reflect that time. For example, if I enter that a task will take 4 hours to complete, the Timeline should account for those 4 hours starting from the specified date and automatically calculate the finish date.

Is there a way to achieve this on Monday.com, or is there a feature similar to this?

I would greatly appreciate any help.
